summary: QC Team Master CRUD and Inspection Grid with Rejections Array testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - QC Team page with add/edit/delete, Batch Detail inspection form with editable grid (Resource, Date, Bottles, Reason columns), Add/Remove row buttons, Rejection Summary section, and Rejection Report page.

issues: Sidebar shows Sales context instead of Production context when on /qc-team page. The QC Team nav item is defined in Production navigation group but sidebar doesn't auto-switch context based on current route.

action_items: Consider auto-switching sidebar context to Production when navigating to Production-related pages like /qc-team, /production-batches, /qc-routes, /rejection-reasons, /rejection-report

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and integrations verified

seed_data_creation: Used existing test batch: BATCH-TEST-001 (ID: 5833eb23-8664-4a53-8fc7-eedb9ff18178). Created test QC team members and rejection reasons during tests (cleaned up after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: QC Team Master CRUD and Inspection Grid features fully tested. Key features: 1) QC Team Master at /qc-team - CRUD operations with duplicate name validation (400 error). 2) Inspection form editable grid with data-testids: rej-grid-row-{idx}, rej-resource-{idx}, rej-date-{idx}, rej-qty-{idx}, rej-reason-{idx}, rej-remove-{idx}, add-rej-row-{stage_id}. 3) InspectionRecord Pydantic model accepts rejections array with {resource_id, resource_name, date, qty_rejected, reason}. 4) Total rejected validation: sum cannot exceed qty_inspected * bottles_per_crate. 5) Rejection Summary on batch detail shows per-entry details. 6) Rejection Report shows per-entry rows with resource_name, date, reason. 7) Navigation: QC Team is at /qc-team, defined in Production sidebar group (line 120 in DashboardLayout.js).

Backend_API_Tests.GET_qc_team_list: PASSED - Returns list of QC team members
Backend_API_Tests.POST_qc_team_create: PASSED - Creates new member with id, name, role
Backend_API_Tests.GET_batch_for_inspection: PASSED - Returns batch with stage_balances, qc_stages, bottles_per_crate
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspection_with_rejections_array: PASSED - Records inspection with multiple rejection entries
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspection_total_rejected_validatio: PASSED - Returns 400 when total exceeds max bottles
Backend_API_Tests.POST_inspection_with_zero_rejections: PASSED - Records inspection with empty rejections (all pass)

Frontend_UI_Tests.Add_Member_button: PASSED - Opens form with name/role inputs
